mandatory_clauses.description: Full names and addresses of both employer and employee
Job title and description of the role and responsibilities
Gross monthly salary meeting or exceeding the kennismigrant salary threshold (IND-published annually)
Notice period for both employer and employee
Vakantiegeld of at least 8% of gross salary
Reference to IND-recognised sponsor status and applicable permit type (kennismigrant / gecombineerde vergunning)
Explicit statement of the work authorisation type supporting this employment
